commands.repair_reason: This security-sensitive external PR needs contributor real behavior proof and maintainer review of the runtime-import coverage issue before it can merge.; Needs attention: The diff changes a security scanner exclusion and can create a false-negative path for runtime-loaded files with test-like names.; Review finding: [P2] Preserve runtime imports when excluding test files — src/security/audit-extra.async.ts:256 (sha=cf58ba98816b52d881b0f57fce32d893ac948f5e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `getCodeSafetySummary` to pass `excludeTestFiles: true` to the shared scanner and adds a regression test that spies scanner options during plugin code-safety collection.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main deep audit calls the scanner without `excludeTestFiles`, and the scanner default includes test files. A plugin test file with `process.env` and nearby network-send syntax will reach `env-harvesting`; I did not run a live audit in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: This security-sensitive external PR needs contributor real behavior proof and maintainer review of the runtime-import coverage issue before it can merge.
